design_patterns/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler plugin source and target versions from Java 8 to Java 21 to align with the migration target.
design_patterns/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 8 language features, preventing the use of Java 21 APIs and syntax, and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if the application relies on newer JDK features.
